2385270.name: Roxy Raccoon's Pinball Panic - Club Crazy
2385270.description:
2 Brand New Tables with online leaderboards and unlockable cosmetics!

Night club themed tables where party-goers can have a ball of a time!

Club Crazy

  • Standard sized table with 1 upper playfield.
  • 3 Flippers, 2 Slingshots, 3 Bumpers, 5 Stationary Targets, 12 Drop Targets, 11 Rollovers, 1 Hole, 1 Raceway, 1 Controllable Bumper.
  • Ball Saver, Extra Ball, Kickback, Score Multiplier

Party Plaza

  • Ultra-Wide table with 3 upper playfields.
  • 6 Flippers, 3 Slingshots, 3 Bumpers, 6 Stationary Targets, 8 Drop Targets, 6 Rollovers, 5 Spinners, 2 Raceways, 1 Controllable Bumper.
  • Ball Saver, Extra Ball, Kickback, Score Multiplier.

Cosmetics

  • Crumpled up Paper Ball: 1 new playable character (the ball handles the same, differences are visual only).
  • 6 Night Club themed accessories.
  • 6 Furs, appropriate for a party-goer!
2385270.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 德语, 波兰语, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 土耳其语, 意大利语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
